news.t: YieldMax® ETFs Announces Weekly Distributions for Group 1 ETFs
UPDATE - YieldMax® ETFs Announces Weekly Distributions for Group 1 ETFs
YieldMax® Introduces Portfolio Option Income Strategy ETF on Strategic Metals & Mining (MINY)

holdings.infoBox: MINY is an equity ETF with a total of 87 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 21.48%, Nucor at 7.04%, Steel Dynamics at 6.81%, Freeport-McMoRan at 4.71%, and Caterpillar at 4.51%.

overview.description: The YieldMax Strategic Metals & Mining Portfolio Option Income ETF (MINY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US-listed metals and mining companies, complemented by various complex options strategies. The fund seeks to provide current income and, secondarily, capital appreciation. MINY was launched on Feb 26, 2026 and is issued by YieldMax.
